subject: WM-0059 review: changes_requested
body: High: stale medical offer/request gate is incomplete: packages/benchmarks/src/m3-ordinary-life-long-run-benchmark.ts:268-270 maps noStaleOffers only to activeMedicalRequests and packages/sim-core/src/m3-invariants.test.ts:96-99 only asserts final activeMedicalRequests, while M3MedicalMetrics.staleBasisRejectCount exists at packages/sim-core/src/m3-medical-care.ts:118-130 and is never propagated from packages/sim-core/src/m3-ordinary-life-scenario.ts:1672-1693. High: condition and mood/relationship drift checks only enforce valid ranges, not stable expected values, at packages/sim-core/src/m3-invariants.test.ts:175-190 and packages/benchmarks/src/m3-ordinary-life-long-run-benchmark.ts:438-456; benchmark invariants omit final condition/mood/relationship values at packages/benchmarks/src/m3-ordinary-life-long-run-benchmark.ts:300-343.
